ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HILAG INTERNATIONAL, INC., DBA ELAUNCHERS.COM, PARTHIV SHAH, AND DIPALI SHAH'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Appearances via Zoom:
J. Philip Martin (415.794.1856, jpm@kastnerkim.com) for plaintiffs and responding parties;
No other appearances.

Mr. Martin did not give notice of his intent to contest the tentative ruling. This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar in light of the ruling on defendant Hilag International, Inc.'s demurrer to the first amended complaint. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS HILAG INTERNATIONAL, INC., DBA ELAUNCHERS.COM, PARTHIV SHAH, and DIPALI SHAH'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT

Appearances via Zoom:
J. Philip Martin (415.794.1856, jpm@kastnerkim.com) for plaintiffs and responding parties;
No other appearances.

Mr. Martin did not give notice of his intent to contest the tentative ruling. This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Hilag International, Inc.'s demurrer to all four causes of action in the first amended complaint are sustained without leave to amend as to all four causes of action. Plaintiff Roulac Global's failure to file any opposition papers to the demurrer is a concession that the demurrer is meritorious and that there is no reasonable possibility that plaintiff is able to file a second amended complaint alleging a viable cause of action. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
